description_long: This is a modern, luxurious bungalow set on a rectangular plot with manicured lawns and palm trees. The structure features a flat black roof, extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, and a combination of concrete, glass, and wood materials. The front facade is dominated by large glass panels and a covered entryway, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with a swimming pool and sun loungers. The side views reveal a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a garage, multiple balconies, and a shaded outdoor area. The landscaping is minimalistic, with geometric grass patches and a retaining wall surrounding the property. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass windows, a swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and luxurious outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and landscaped lawn with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, garage area, and a glimpse of the pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, sun loungers, and extensive glass facade opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, the garage, and more of the landscaped lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
